headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, Hero statements, Philosophical quotes

body.usage: Paragraphs, Dashboard data, UI elements, Navigation

mono.usage: Tactical stats, module numbers, small metrics

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for structural sections. Containers must have internal padding.
layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid for Marketing/Landing sections and 'Control Room' grid for Student Dashboard.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and dashboard components. Center-align hero quotes and philosophical milestones.

components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] transition-all. Secondary: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10.
components_instructions.cards: Flat background (#111), 1px subtle border (#27272A). On hover: elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) and change border to gold_subtle with a soft shadow shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.05)].
components_instructions.glassmorphism: Used only for sticky headers/floating nav: bg-[#050505]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
components_instructions.tactical_diagrams: Render field diagrams using SVG on a very dark green or black pitch background. Use gold (#D4AF37) for lines and interactive player nodes. Nodes should have a subtle pulse animation.
components_instructions.ai_chat: Chat interface should look like a premium messaging app. User messages in muted gray bubbles, AI (Instructor) messages in black bubbles with gold borders. Use a serif font for the AI's philosophical responses to give it 'voice'.

hero_background.description: Cinematic abstract background of a football pitch drawn in glowing gold lines

philosophical_stadium.description: A majestic, empty football stadium at night illuminated by a single warm golden spotlight

tactical_board.description: Close up of a football coach's hands moving gold tactile pieces

real_coach_stadium_night_1.description: Group of people on a soccer field at night, great for 'about us' or 'community' section

real_coach_stadium_night_2.description: People standing on green grass field during night time, ambient lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Setup Tailwind config to include the custom colors and fonts defined above.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for elegant, thin-line duotone icons that match the premium feel.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their default borders and backgrounds. Remove generic styling. Elements should be flat black with subtle #27272A or gold borders.
For the AI Chat, use Shadcn Card and ScrollArea, but style the messages to feel like an academic/philosophical dialogue (AI uses serif font).
For the Tactical Diagrams, use pure HTML/SVG drawn with gold lines against a dark background.
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute for testing.
Ensure all Italian text is correctly encoded and grammatically appropriate for a philosophical coaching context (e.g., using terms like 'Periodizzazione Tattica', 'Il Modello di Gioco').
Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' to Google Fonts import in index.css or via Next.js fonts.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use Outfit for sans-serif body text.
Avoid standard blue/teal accents. All active/focus states MUST be gold (#D4AF37).
